com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits
Class CrossSVFilter

java.lang.Object
  java.util.Observable
      com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthObject
          com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSound
              com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthCircuit
                  com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthNote
                      com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits.CrossSVFilter

public class CrossSVFilter
extends SynthNote

Cross Coupled State Variable Filters Each filter frequency modulates the other.

setStage

public void setStage(int time,
                     int stage)
              throws SynthException
Description copied from class: SynthSound
Set stage of multi-stage sound. Typically noteOn will be stage 0, off will be 1.

setStage in class SynthSound

SynthException - If an error occurs.
